main.description: A signed capability delegation. The issuer (iss) grants the audience (aud) the attenuated scope until expiresAt. The record's canonical DAG-CBOR is signed by the issuer's did:key via the Signer seam (detached signature, as with blue.chum.pointer.record). prev links the parent capability when this record attenuates an existing delegation chain.

aud.description: Delegate DID this capability is granted to.

scope.description: One or more attenuations. Authority is the union of the entries.

prev.description: Parent capability CID; null/absent at the chain root.

nonce.description: Distinguishes otherwise-identical grants so each has a distinct CID.

capabilityScope.description: A UCAN-style with/can attenuation: the abilities (can) granted over a resource (bucket, optionally narrowed by keyPrefix).

keyPrefix.description: Absent/empty = whole bucket; otherwise restricts to keys under this prefix.
